## What

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Why

Why is this change needed?

## How

Key implementation details, tradeoffs, or alternatives considered.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] Benchmarks pass (`make bench-short`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`make lint`)
- [ ] Site synced if HTML changed (`make site-sync`)
- [ ] Module count updated if modules added/removed
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
